headline: Intl Flavors & Fragrances Affirms FY2026 Sales Guidance of $10.500B-$10.800B vs $10.717B Est
summary: Intl Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) affirms FY2026 sales outlook from $10.500 billion-$10.800 billion to $10.500 billion-$10.800 billion vs $10.717 billion estimate.

headline: Intl Flavors & Fragrances Q1 Adj. EPS $1.25 Beats $1.07 Estimate, Sales $2.741B Beat $2.642B Estimate
summary: Intl Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) reported quarterly earnings of $1.25 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $1.07 by 16.82 percent. This is a 4.17 percent increase over earnings of $1.20 per share
